title: App Settings - General - Account - Log in
scenario: User logs in via App Settings > General > Account and sees "Your account" text with populated Name and Email fields, while Share data remains hidden.
steps: Check that Name field is populated with the user's details
Check that Email field is populated with the user's details
Verify that Share data is not visible
expected: 'Your account' text is visible. Name and Email fields are populated with the user's details. Share data is not visible.
